name: Cable Rope Overhead Triceps Extension
aliases: Cable Rope High Pulley Overhead Triceps Extension
shortDescription: An isolation exercise using a rope attachment on a high pulley to target the triceps overhead.
instructions: Stand or kneel with your back to the high pulley, grasping the rope with both hands. Lean forward slightly, extend your elbows to press the rope forward/upward, then return to start under control.
steps: Attach a rope to a high pulley.
Stand (or kneel) with back facing the machine.
Grasp rope, step forward, and lean slightly.
Keep upper arms still, extend elbows bringing rope forward/upward.
breathing: Exhale as you extend, inhale as you bend elbows.
